calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-19-2022 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-18-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Meeghan Buckley, via Zoom, for John Thomas, Administrator.

Counsel offers an update regarding the Examiner's notes and advises that a third supplement to the petition was filed on May-12-2022. Counsel reports of delays in clearing the notes due to the Administrator living in a rural area and of not having easy access to the bank. Counsel advises that her client has contacted and worked with the bank to assuage the Court's concerns regarding proper protection of the estate funds and that all assets in the account are now FDIC insured.

The court takes the matter under submission.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Gomez. Not Reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-25-2022 Continued To May-16-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-01-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated 9/20/1985 is admitted to probate. John M. Thomas is appointed Administrator with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000. Isidoor Bornstein is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for 9/19/2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
